parsed.generic_mechanism: Preserved causal sequencing lets examples accumulate into an argument; scrambling those units severs references and turns purposeful transitions into isolated assertions, overwhelming otherwise serviceable sentence-level prose.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Summary material arrives first, conclusions precede their premises, pronouns lose their referents, and the text finally backs into its chapter heading and partial contents list.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete eating situations, sensory examples, and analogies build a coherent conditioning argument, though repeated assurances and late motivational promises slow the final approach to the instruction and recap.
